context: User wants to control OpenCode programmatically from an external script.

checklist.name: Correct client initialization
checklist.description: Uses `createOpencode` with hostname/port or `createOpencodeClient` with baseUrl

checklist.name: Creates a session
checklist.description: Calls `client.session.create()` to create a new session

checklist.name: Sends prompt via client.session.prompt
checklist.description: Uses `client.session.prompt` with parts array containing text message

checklist.name: Handles response data
checklist.description: Accesses `.data` from the response and prints/logs it
